items.title: 主线结论（系统版｜条件触发）
items.summary:
- 主导因子：10年期利率 + 原油价格/风险事件
- 四件套监控：10年期利率（方向/拐点）｜美元指数（强弱）｜VIX（是否抬升）｜原油价格/风险事件（是否升级）
- 跨资产联动：10年期利率上升→NQ/ES承压更明显；美元指数上升→黄金价格更易回撤；VIX上升→盘中更易急拉急杀/假突破
- 未来90分钟关键窗口：关注是否临近数据/讲话/美债拍卖/开盘等事件窗；事件前后避免追单
- 情景A：若10年期利率继续上行且VIX抬升→偏NQ/ES先空后看、GC偏弱震荡；操作偏好：等确认后顺势
- 情景B：若10年期利率回落且VIX回落→偏NQ/ES修复反弹、GC喘息；操作偏好：回踩参与、避免追高
- 期权：事件密度高→偏买波动/带保护；事件窗过去且VIX回落→
items.summary_en:
- 主导因子：10Y/利率 + 原油/风险事件
- 四件套监控：10Y（方向/拐点）｜DXY（强弱）｜VIX（是否抬升）｜原油/风险事件（是否升级）
- 跨资产联动：10Y↑→NQ/ES承压更明显；DXY↑→GC更易回撤；VIX↑→盘中更易急拉急杀/假突破
- 未来90分钟关键窗口：关注是否临近数据/讲话/美债拍卖/开盘等事件窗；事件前后避免追单
- 情景A：若10Y继续上行且VIX抬升→偏NQ/ES先空后看、GC偏弱震荡；操作偏好：等确认后顺势
- 情景B：若10Y回落且VIX回落→偏NQ/ES修复反弹、GC喘息；操作偏好：回踩参与、避免追高
- 期权：事件密度高→偏买波动/带保护；事件窗过去且VIX回落→再考虑卖波动
- ——
- 地缘/避险线索：Analysis-Iran war chokes petrochemical supply, sends plastic prices soar…
- 宏观/Fed线索：Global forecasting group sees U.S. inflation at 4.2% this year, much hig…

items.title: 谷歌AI突破给内存芯片股价带来压力，涉及三星、微星等公司。
items.summary: SK Hynix、Samsung和Micron的股票价格下跌，投资者担心未来可能需要的内存芯片数量会减少。
items.title_en: A Google AI breakthrough is pressuring memory chip stocks from Samsung to Micron
items.summary_en: SK Hynix, Samsung and Micron shares fell as investors fear fewer memory chips may be required in the future.

items.title: Meta的法律案件失败进一步加剧了扎克伯格的困境，这被视为社交媒体的"分水岭事件"。
items.summary: Meta在涉及儿童安全的两个独立案件中遭遇了严厉的失败，这些失败凸显了公众对社交媒体行业的态度正在发生变化。
items.title_en: Meta's court defeats add to Zuckerberg's recent woes, represent 'watershed event' for social media
items.summary_en: Meta suffered stinging defeats in two separate trials involving child safety that underscore shifting public sentiment toward the social media industry.

items.title: Arm跳涨16%，公司预计新芯片将带来收入风暴，这被认为是“重大转变”。
items.summary: Arm表示，预计其新芯片将在2031年产生的收入比2025年4亿美元高六倍。
items.title_en: Arm jumps 16% as company expects revenue windfall from new chip, a 'significant shift'
items.summary_en: Arm said it expects its new chip to generate six times more revenue in 2031 than the $4 billion it made in 2025.

items.title: 洛杉矶陪审团裁定Meta、YouTube在社交媒体成瘾案中负有疏忽之责。
items.summary: 一场专注于Meta和YouTube的洛杉矶案件的陪审团做出了裁决，这场案件专家们称之为社交媒体的"大烟草"时刻。
items.title_en: Jury in Los Angeles finds Meta, YouTube negligent in social media addiction trial
items.summary_en: A jury reached a verdict in the LA trial focused on Meta and YouTube, a case that experts have characterized as social media's "Big Tobacco" moment.

items.title: 新墨西哥州寻求修改Meta的平台规则，理由是陪审团裁定该公司有责任。
items.summary: 新墨西哥州检察长拉乌尔·托雷斯计划在案件下一阶段要求算法和设计变更、年龄验证和独立验证。
items.title_en: New Mexico seeking changes to Meta's platform after jury finds company liable
items.summary_en: New Mexico Attorney General Raúl Torrez plans to ask for algorithm and design changes, age verification and independent verification in the trial's next phase.

items.title: 微软的多元化首席官即将离职，公司正在进行“人工智能驱动的转型”。
items.summary: 微软正致力于开发顶级人工智能模型和产品，吸引和留住顶级人才变得越来越重要。
items.title_en: Microsoft's diversity chief is leaving as company continues 'AI-powered transformation'
items.summary_en: Hiring and retaining top talent is becoming more critical as Microsoft seeks to develop top-class artificial intelligence models and products.

items.title: 法律AI初创公司Harvey在融资轮次中估值11亿美元，投资人在模型公司之外扩大押注。
items.summary: 哈维将使用其新资金扩大其人工智能代理和法律工程团队。
items.title_en: Legal AI startup Harvey valued at $11 billion in funding round, as VCs spread bets beyond model companies
items.summary_en: Harvey will use its fresh capital to expand its AI agents and grow its embedded legal engineering teams.

items.title: 马克·扎克伯格重启人工智能计划，前Meta高管巴拉(Hugo Barra)重返公司
items.summary: 胡戈·巴拉在第一次加入Meta时，公司正大力推进VR领域。现在他回归，重点转向人工智能代理。
items.title_en: Hugo Barra's return to Meta 5 years after exit underscores Zuckerberg's AI urgency
items.summary_en: During Hugo Barra's first stint at Meta, the company was pushing heavily into VR. Now, he's back and the focus is AI agents.

items.title: Meta因违反新墨西哥州法律而必须支付3750万美元的赔偿，陪审团做出裁决

items.summary_en: Jury reaches a verdict in New Mexico trial in which the state's attorney general alleged that Meta failed to safeguard its family of apps from child predators.

items.title: 全球预测团队预计美国今年通胀率将达到4.2%，远高于美联储的估计。
items.summary: 预测值大幅上调至2.8%，远高于联邦储备委员会官员的2.7%估计。
items.title_en: Global forecasting group sees U.S. inflation at 4.2% this year, much higher than Fed estimate
items.summary_en: The forecast is a sharp step up from the prior projection of 2.8%. Moreover, it is much higher than the 2.7% Fed officials estimated.

items.title: 摩根士丹利策略师称，债券十年失落意味着高质量股票是抵御通货膨胀的最佳方式。
items.summary: 全球大流行引发了一个将持续三十年的通胀热潮，摩根士丹利首席美国股权策略师认为投资者应该转向高质量股票来应对通胀，而不是债券。
items.title_en: A lost decade for bonds means high-quality stocks are the best way to protect against inflation, says Morgan Stanley strategist
items.summary_en: The worldwide pandemic has started an inflationary boom that will last three decades, which means investors should turn to high-quality stocks rather than bonds for inflation protection, according to Morgan Stanley’s chief U.S. equity strategist.

items.title: 随着三月狂欢赛的进行，纽约联邦储备银行（NY Fed）指出体育投注对消费者信贷健康的冲击

items.summary_en: As sports gambling becomes more popular and less restricted, consumer credit health is suffering, according to a new report by the New York Fed.

items.title_en: Market Digest: ADM, OGE
